tutorial.gameplay1: Stage 1 is an area known as The Loop. Taking the train from the hub will take you to it. There, you can obtain loot, complete obectives, and fend off against hordes of zombies. The train will arrive at the station within The Loop every 90s.
tutorial.gameplay2_1: The train has arrived. You can either board the train, taking you to
tutorial.gameplay2_3: or you can let it pass and stay in The Loop, getting higher tier loot as it upgrades. But beware, the zombies will grow stronger the longer you stay...
tutorial.gameplay3_1: This is the hub. Here, you can use
tutorial.gameplay3_3: to power up your weapons, invest money in the
tutorial.gameplay3_5: to gain interest, and purchase items to help you survive the loop for longer. Once you are prepared, just step back onto the train to return to

save.say_name.warning1: THE FOLLOWING PLAYERS ARE NOT ONLINE:
save.say_name.warning2: Loading it without them will erase their data
reset.all_players: All players must be in the train
lobby.chests2: Tiered loot upgrades after you open them once!
lobby.difficulty2: Difficulty increases each train loop. Overtime, the zombies will grow stronger. Your goal is to keep up and beat the highscore by staying alive, killing zombies and vaulting cash!
lobby.pu.item_notice: You will now start runs with a random item!
lobby.pr.gun_machine_notice: First Gun Machine purchase is free next run!
lobby.pr.armor_notice: You will start with Armor next run!
lobby.hyperdrive_info3: your weapons. Each time the train returns to the station, a loop occurs. You must have
lobby.merger_text1: Place 2 Guns of the same type
map.skeleton.unlock: Reach loop 30+ on Standard or loop 60+ on Blitz
event.soul.name: SOUL HARVESTER
event.soul_chest.name: SOUL CHEST
dumpster.title: SELL GUNS & ITEMS
dumpster.subtitle: Must have a Value
shop.title: SHOP
gun_shop.title: GUN SHOP
stats.title: -Match Stats-
tip.1: Catching the train lets you get back to safety if the loop gets too tough!
tip.2: Vending machines offer quick resources such as Ammo and Health Packs.
tip.3: Headshots deal more damage! However leg shots deal less!
tip.4: You can reload early by using your offhand keybind!
tip.5: Powerups can be bought in the lobby in between loops!
tip.6: The Gun Merger can combine the stats and upgrades of 2 copies of a gun!
tip.7: You can revive teammates by catching the train back to the lobby!
tip.8: Earn interest every loop by VAULTING your cash at the lobby!
tip.9: Zombies cannot hurt you once you are on the train back.
tip.10: The HYPERDRIVES are a worthwhile investment... make sure you have ENERGY CORES!
tip.11: Check your ADVANCEMENTS to see all the guns you have unlocked so far!
tip.12: Reloading in the lobby does not consume any ammo, so fire away at that dummy!
tip.13: Reload with cash in your hand to bundle it!
vault.not_enough_cash: You are not holding enough cash!
guide.gun_abilities.desc: Some guns have unique effects and do more than just dealing damage, make sure you to experiment with every gun!
guide.powercells.desc: Powercells can be found 60% of the time in the loop. They are used to power the HYPERFORGE found on the edge of the map.
guide.hyperchips.desc: After powering the HYPERFORGE and defending it, a Hyperchip is created which can be used on a HYPERDRIVE at the hub to advance the level up process by 1 loop.
guide.vault.desc: Upon returning to the hub, you can store CASH found in the loop into here. Stored CASH in the VAULT are accounted for when calculating score, not money in the inventory. Must upgrade the maximum capacity of the vault.
guide.interest.desc: When a loop happens, you gain a base of 5% interest on your stored cash. This interest can be upgraded in the VAULT up to 8%.
guide.value.desc: Most items have a VALUE attached to them. Every item with a VALUE can be sold at the dumpster when returning to the hub after a loop.
guide.loot.desc: Loot trash cans can be found all over the map, rush to grab them all!
guide.tiered_loot.desc: Tiered Loot can regenerate and upgrade after being opened. The tiers start at 1 and can upgrade to 3. They are more prominent towards the center of the map. You will have to skip some trains to get them to tier 3!
guide.artifact.desc: Artifacts can appear in the middle of the map. Once started, they take a minute to fully charge. Charge them up by staying close by. Once charged, it will explode into loot for each player!
guide.difficulty.desc: Everytime the train arrives while in the loop, and every time you decide to take it the difficulty of the game goes up. Higher difficulty = harder zombies and more unique zombies. Reaching higher difficulties also increases score.
guide.loop.desc: In addition to that, when the train returns a loop also occurs. This is when Hyperdrives upgrade, Vault grants interest and the difficulty increases.
guide.zombies.desc: Zombies are your main enemy. Killing zombies add to your score so kill a bunch! As you reach higher loops, difficulty increases, they get stronger, gain unique abilities and spawn more frequently!
guide.special_zombies.desc: There are many special zombies that have custom heads you can encounter after difficulty 5. These zombies are dangerous and may occasionally drop their heads... Obtain each to see what they do
guide.hyper_zombies.desc: After loop 30, there are over 100+ variants of unique zombies that can mix and match abilities called HYPER ZOMBIES. These are the hardest but most valuable zombies in the game. Goodluck!
guide.permanent_upgrades.desc: Permanent upgrades can be bought BEFORE starting a run with TOKENS aquired from completed runs. 1 TOKEN is rewarded for every 1000 points scored.
guide.per_run_upgrades.desc: PER-RUN Upgrades are upgrades that can also be purchased BEFORE a run, however these must always be re-purchased and do not stay.
guide.energy_cores.desc: Energy Cores are used to power hyperdrives. When you find them in the loop, return to hub and store them into the ENERGY VAULT.
guide.hyperdrive.desc: Hyperdrives are used to level up weapons and have 3 variants, Power, Reload and Capacity. After 2 loops in chat will be announced which Hyperdrive has upgraded if it has a weapon inside of it.
guide.reload_drive.desc: Reload speed on a weapon can be upgraded up to 5 times, 10% reload speed per level.
guide.capacity_drive.desc: Capacity increased max ammo of the weapon by 20%, typically allowing double the ammo at a max level of 5 (100%)
guide.power_drive.desc: Power increases the level of a gun by +5, which is very useful for keeping up with the difficulty scaling!
obj.blow.desc: Die on Loop 0. You blew it.
obj.dev.baster.desc: OBLITERATE a Zombie from 40+ blocks away with the BASter
obj.dev.phaic.desc: Kill a Greed Hyper Zombie using phaic's payroll
obj.forge.create.desc: Create a Hyperchip at a Forge
obj.forge.forgery.desc: Create 2 Hyperchips without taking a train
obj.forge.optimizer.desc: Use a Hyperchip on a Hyperdrive
obj.hyper.beloved.desc: Obtain and hold a Level 30+ Starter Pistol
obj.hyper.cores.desc: Have 100 or more Energy Cores in the Vault
obj.hyper.max.desc: Max out a Weapon's Reload or Capacity
obj.hyper.upgrade.desc: Upgrade a Weapon in a HYPERDRIVE
obj.loop.broke.desc: Take the train with $10 or less held
obj.loop.first_train.desc: Use the Train to return to the Hub
obj.loop.time.desc: Take the train with 2s or less before it departs
obj.misc.freeze.desc: Kill a Zombie while it is suspended in mid air after being flashed with the Camera
obj.misc.grave.desc: Kill a Zombie with a Shovel
obj.vend.420.desc: Use a Hyperchip on a Hyperdrive with the Ghoul Gat
obj.vend.agent.desc: Find and Purchase an Agent 511 Gun
item.hyperchip.desc1: Use on a weapon inside any
item.cash.desc2: at the HUB to cash in
item.molotov.desc: Creates burning area where it lands
item.syringe.desc: When activated, heals on each bullet hit
item.mgt.desc: Places a Machine Gun Turret that lasts for 45s
item.blt.desc1: I unwrap the BLT like it is a gift. As if
item.blt.desc2: it were a present from the deli god. The
item.blt.desc3: first thing that hits me is the bacon. The
item.blt.desc4: sweet savory smoky bacon. Then, right beneath
item.blt.desc5: it is that cool, crunchy lettuce. Last, but
item.blt.desc6: definitely not least is the tomato. Oh tomato, the
item.blt.desc7: things I would do for you. Now, imagine this...
item.blt.desc8: All of these ingredients combined into one, into a
item.blt.desc9: creation so impossibly delicious that I had to
item.blt.desc10: call the police and report a first degree yummy.
item.armor_up.desc: Right click on a Hyperdrive with any armor piece in it to upgrade
item.grilled_cheese.desc1: Ohh where do I begin.. The soft golden
item.grilled_cheese.desc2: nectar? The beautifully flattened and charred bread?
item.grilled_cheese.desc3: Describing such a meal worthy of the Gods is no easy task. When
item.grilled_cheese.desc4: I lay my eyes on this beauty, I can not help but shed a tear. Am
item.grilled_cheese.desc5: I worthy of such a delicacy? What did I do to deserve such a tasteful treat?
item.grilled_cheese.desc6: I think this everytime my sinful tongue lays itself on this divine dish.
item.grilled_cheese.desc7: They say death is what motivates us to make the most of our lives, but no my friends,
item.grilled_cheese.desc8: this craftmenship of a sandwich is the real meaning behind why we do things. Do not
item.grilled_cheese.desc9: ever let anyone tell you otherwise, for they will be smitten by the Gods themselves.
item.gun_crate.desc: Gives you a GOLDEN Variant of a random gun...
item.overdrive.desc: Right click on a Hyperdrive to force upgrade the item
item.phoenix_serum.desc: Brings you back from the dead
item.phoenix_serum.already_used: You already have the flame of ambition within you...
item.tesla_emp.desc1: Places a Tesla down that pulses periodically, pushing
item.tesla_emp.desc2: away, damaging, and weakening nearby enemies
